Services/Funnel Building

Funnel Building

End-to-end funnels that connect acquisition, nurture, and sales—measured at every step.

Discuss this serviceStart with an audit

Overview

A funnel is the operational expression of your go-to-market strategy. We define the offer, the narrative, the pages, the follow-up, and the metrics—so you can see where money leaks and where to scale. We integrate paid, organic, email, and sales touchpoints into one coherent buyer journey.

Benefits

  • Offer and messaging clarity that improves ad efficiency and close rates
  • Landing + thank-you + nurture sequences that match intent
  • CRM and automation wiring so leads don’t die in the handoff
  • Dashboards that show stage conversion—not just top-of-funnel vanity

How we work

  1. Economics & ICP

    What you sell, to whom, at what velocity, and with what proof.

  2. Journey mapping

    Stages, assets required, and responsibilities across teams.

  3. Build

    Pages, forms, tags, automations, and sales notifications.

  4. Optimize

    Weekly reviews until stable, then continuous testing.

Tools & platforms

  • Webflow / WordPress / Next.js (client stack)
  • HubSpot
  • Zapier / Make
  • GA4
  • Stripe (if applicable)

Need a bundled program?

Combine this service with SEO, CRO, and analytics for a unified growth roadmap.

View packages

FAQs

Is this only for B2B?

No—ecommerce and lead-gen both benefit. The architecture changes, but the principles stay the same: clarity, proof, and fast next steps.

Do you build websites as part of funnels?

We can coordinate builds with your team or partners, and we specify what the funnel needs to convert.

Ready to talk specifics?

Tell us your goals—we will come prepared with a point of view.

GNK Marketing is an AI-first performance agency. We build automated growth systems—chatbots, funnels, ads ops, and analytics—alongside SEO, paid media, and CRO to turn traffic into pipeline and revenue.
